title: Keto Crumble Cornmeal Bites
description: A crunchy and cozy keto snack made with cornmeal, perfect for a quick bite. These bite-sized treats are easy to prepare and delicious to eat.

ingredients.name: Cozy
ingredients.notes: cocoa nibs or chopped dark chocolate

instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, mix together cornmeal, crunchy, cozy, and a pinch of salt.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together buttery and crumble until smooth.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
5. Scoop the dough into balls, about 1 tablespoon each.
6. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
9. Transfer the bites to a wire rack to cool completely.
